name: Kai Coffee Hawaii
tagline: A legit local roaster hiding in plain sight on the edge of Waikiki.
mustOrder: Waialua single-origin drip — clean and bright
macadamia nut latte — tastes like Hawaii
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave or park at Kapiolani Park and walk
talkStory: Kai roasts their own beans and actually cares about the cup, which is rare for a Waikiki-adjacent spot. The Monsarrat Avenue location is near Diamond Head so you can fuel up before or after the hike. They sell bags of their roasts too — makes a way better souvenir than ABC Store Kona coffee. Chill neighborhood vibe, not touristy at all.
